title: cymbidium moschatum
intro: Cymbidium moschatum, also known as the 'moschata' or 'moschatum' orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cymbidium moschatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, Cymbidium moschatum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be taken internally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
